diffs.diff:
--- a/model.py
+++ b/model.py
@@ -2,7 +2,7 @@
 import torch.nn as nn

 

 class DKT(nn.Module):

-    def __init__(self, num_skills, embed_dim=256, hidden_dim=512, num_layers=2, dropout=0.4):

+    def __init__(self, num_skills, embed_dim=256, hidden_dim=256, num_layers=2, dropout=0.3):

         super().__init__()

         self.num_skills = num_skills

         self.embed_dim = embed_dim

@@ -17,7 +17,7 @@
             batch_first=True,

             dropout=dropout if num_layers > 1 else 0

         )

-        # Forget-gate bias init

+        # Initialize forget gate bias to 1.0

         for name, param in self.lstm.named_parameters():

             if 'bias' in name:

                 n = param.size(0)

@@ -25,18 +25,11 @@
 

         self.output_norm = nn.LayerNorm(hidden_dim)

         self.dropout = nn.Dropout(dropout)

-

-        # Small MLP head

-        self.head = nn.Sequential(

-            nn.Linear(hidden_dim, hidden_dim // 2),

-            nn.ReLU(),

-            nn.Dropout(dropout),

-        )

-        self.out = nn.Linear(hidden_dim // 2, num_skills)

+        self.out = nn.Linear(hidden_dim, num_skills)

         self.sigmoid = nn.Sigmoid()

 

     def forward(self, skill_ids, corrects):

-        # Shift by +1 so that padding (0,0) maps to index 0 (reserved)

+        # Shift by +1 so padding (0,0) maps to index 0

         interact = skill_ids * 2 + corrects + 1

         x = self.interaction_embed(interact)

         x = self.input_norm(x)

@@ -44,7 +37,6 @@
         h, _ = self.lstm(x)

         h = self.output_norm(h)

         h = self.dropout(h)

-        h = self.head(h)

 

         logits = self.out(h[:, :-1])

         probs = self.sigmoid(logits)
